title: Starter Story Top 50 Pattern
hook: I analyzed Starter Story's top 50 apps. Here's the pattern.
voiceoverScript: I analyzed Starter Story's top fifty apps. Here's the pattern. Seventy eight percent were built by solo founders. Average revenue twelve thousand a month. Forty two percent used AI as a core feature. And the most common niche? Productivity tools for specific professions. Not general productivity. Specific. A CRM for dentists. A scheduler for dog walkers. An invoice tool for freelance designers. The pattern is narrow niche plus simple tool plus subscription pricing. If I were starting today, I'd pick a profession, find their biggest spreadsheet headache, and build a ten dollar a month solution. Full breakdown in comments.

scenes.label: The Starter Story Pattern
scenes.text: 50 apps analyzed. One clear pattern emerged.

scenes.label: The Playbook
scenes.text: Narrow niche + simple tool + subscription = money
